name: codegraph
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        colbymchenry /

      codegraph  

    
      Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
summary: CodeGraph 是一个为 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编程助手预建索引的代码知识图谱，能大幅减少 token 消耗和工具调用次数，且完全本地运行，值得关注因为它显著提升 AI 编码效率并保护代码隐私。

name: rohitg00
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        rohitg00 /

      ai-engineering-from-scratch  

    
      Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
summary: 该项目是一个从零开始学习AI工程的Python教程，涵盖构建和部署完整AI系统的全过程，因其系统化的实践路线和开源共享精神而值得关注。

name: Understand-Anything
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Lum1104 /

      Understand-Anything  

    
      Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
summary: 该项目能将任意代码转化为可交互、可搜索的知识图谱，并支持通过自然语言提问来理解代码逻辑。它值得关注，因为它让代码理解变得直观高效，且兼容主流AI编程工具。

name: oh-my-pi
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        can1357 /

      oh-my-pi  

    
      ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more
summary: oh-my-pi 是一个终端 AI 编码代理，支持哈希锚定编辑、优化工具集、LSP、Python、浏览器和子代理等功能，因其强大的终端集成和模块化扩展能力而值得关注。

name: nn-zero-to-hero
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        karpathy /

      nn-zero-to-hero  

    
      Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
summary: 该项目是Andrej Karpathy从零开始手把手教授神经网络原理与实现的系列教程，因其深入浅出的讲解和完整的代码实践而备受关注。

name: RuView
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ruvnet /

      RuView  

    
      π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
summary: RuView 利用普通WiFi信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需任何摄像头即可获取环境智能，因其隐私保护与低成本特性值得关注。

name: the-book-of-secret-knowledge
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        trimstray /

      the-book-of-secret-knowledge  

    
      A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.
summary: 这是一个汇集了各类技术手册、速查表、黑客技巧、命令行工具和优质博客的巨型知识库，因其内容全面且持续更新，被誉为技术人员的“秘密知识宝典”。

name: yt-dlp
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        yt-dlp /

      yt-dlp  

    
      A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader
summary: yt-dlp 是一个功能丰富的命令行音视频下载工具，支持从 YouTube 等上千个网站下载内容。它因持续更新、绕过限制能力强且社区活跃而备受关注。
